scope: C23 and C++20 executable authored curriculum evidence

executionPolicy.dependencies: language standard library only; allowlisted headers checked statically

skillCoverage.facet: hosted entry point, checked input, and termination status

skillCoverage.rationale: The current runner compiles and runs one submitted source set but does not expose separate preprocess, compile, assemble, and link artifacts, so an stdout task would not honestly prove phase diagnosis.
A passing reference program cannot prove that a learner can interpret and repair compiler diagnostics; this facet needs captured failing compilations and diagnostic-aware grading.

skillCoverage.facet: fully parenthesized expression macro for side-effect-free arguments

skillCoverage.rationale: A repeatable multi-file build description and dependency graph are build artifacts outside the current source-plus-stdin/stdout contract.
The pinned runtime compiles ordinary C23 without sanitizer instrumentation, so it cannot honestly claim AddressSanitizer or UndefinedBehaviorSanitizer evidence.

skillCoverage.facet: hosted main, stream I/O, and successful termination

skillCoverage.rationale: The current runner does not expose preprocessing, translation-unit, object, or link-stage artifacts, so successful stdout is not evidence of translation-stage diagnosis.

skillCoverage.facet: qualified lookup across same-named namespace functions

skillCoverage.rationale: A correct reference executable cannot assess reading and repairing compiler diagnostics; this requires a diagnostic-capture assessment mode.

skillCoverage.rationale: Build-system targets, dependencies, warning profiles, and repeatability are external artifacts not represented by deterministic stdin/stdout cases.
The pinned G++ runner is not compiled with sanitizer instrumentation, so passing output cannot serve as sanitizer or undefined-behavior evidence.

remainingGaps: All C/C++ lessons and assessment items remain AI-assisted drafts with no human technical, standards, pedagogy, accessibility, or assessment review; formal exam eligibility remains false.
Ten tooling-oriented skills require translation/diagnostic capture, multi-file build artifact grading, or sanitizer-instrumented execution before executable evidence would be honest.
The verifier proves local digest-pinned Docker behavior, not production NUC deployment, KVM-strength isolation, backup recovery, or operational capacity.

Exact-output cases establish deterministic behavior for each declared executable facet; they do not by themselves prove code style, explanation quality, absence of every undefined behavior, or complete skill mastery.
